title: pelargonium × dendriticum
intro: Pelargonium × dendriticum, also known as 'Dandy Lion' or 'Dandy Lion Geranium', is a species of flowering plant in the geranium family, characterized by its unique and attractive foliage. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, and its leaves and flowers are rich in compounds with medicinal properties, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. The health benefits of Pelargonium × dendriticum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
